# Aleksei Shchetinin

Aleksei Shchetinin works on AI R&D in Berlin, building AI products at Action1 after Wrike.

- Canonical URL: https://alxy.sh/
- Location: Berlin, Germany
- Current work: AI R&D at Action1
- Previous work: Wrike
